overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a Defence Against The Dark Arts classroom from Hogwarts Legacy, featuring a massive skeleton suspended from a vaulted Gothic ceiling, students seated at wooden desks, and warm natural light streaming through tall arched windows. A robed NPC briefly walks through the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: Defence Against The Dark Arts classroom with suspended skeleton exhibit

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the classroom interior from a fixed vantage point near the back of the room

notable_agents.action: walking from right to left across the back of the classroom behind the seated students

entered.detail: massive bone skeleton of a large creature hanging from the vaulted ceiling by chains
tall pointed-arch windows with multiple panes allowing warm natural light to enter
long wooden tables with benches where students are seated facing the front
high Gothic arched ceiling with stone ribbing and dark wooden panels
circular iron light fixture with multiple candles hanging from chains
tall wooden structural beams with vertical planking along the left wall

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a Gothic-style Defence Against The Dark Arts classroom illuminated by warm natural light filtering through tall arched windows. A massive creature skeleton hangs prominently from the vaulted ceiling above rows of wooden student desks where several students remain seated. The stone walls and wooden architectural elements create a historic, atmospheric learning environment. Approximately two-thirds through the clip, a robed figure walks across the background from right to left behind the students.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a historic Gothic classroom that remains atmospheric and still until a brief moment of movement breaks the silence. It begins with a wide view of the Defence Against The Dark Arts room, where warm natural light filters through tall arched windows to illuminate rows of wooden student desks. The camera captures the imposing presence of a massive creature skeleton suspended from the vaulted ceiling, emphasizing the scale of the stone architecture. As the scene lingers on the seated students, a robed figure eventually emerges and walks across the background from right to left. The shot finally settles back into the quiet, scholarly ambiance of the vaulted hall as the figure disappears from view.
